openFindings.title: __test seam list is duplicated
openFindings.description: Export-contract test hard-codes expected __test keys; adding a seam requires editing two files.

openFindings.title: appendGoalJsonl swallows all errors silently
openFindings.description: Audit and debug log append failures are silently dropped, removing observability signals for disk/permission problems.

openFindings.title: Audit dossier DOC-2 (missing export-contract row) is now obsolete; row is present

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (audit dossier drift; F010/F012 same family)

openFindings.title: Audit dossier F4/F5 already mitigated in current code (dossier drift)

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (audit-dossier drift; phase 016 will over-fix)

openFindings.title: Audit e-2.2 Date.now() claim is FALSE for current state
Autonomy kill switch is global env only
openFindings.description: No per-session emergency stop exists beyond goal-level paused; runaway sessions require global env change or goal clear.

openFindings.title: Both feature catalogs miss speckit-goal-offer-contract.test.cjs (8th goal test file)
buildPromptAsyncOptions uses statSync in async path
openFindings.description: An async continuation path performs a blocking synchronous filesystem stat, stalling the event loop.

openFindings.title: changelog README does not list 015-021 placeholder rows
Combined F024+F026: phase 015 REQ-010 partially redundant; 8th test file still missing from catalogs
Command budget parsing only handles trailing --budget N
openFindings.description: Mid-string --budget N is parsed as the budget value and fails validation instead of extracting the suffix.

openFindings.title: Command budget parsing relies on AI instruction
openFindings.description: --budget N parsing and validation are described as instructions to the executing agent rather than a deterministic parser.

openFindings.title: Command output contract summary omits show from ACTION list
openFindings.description: The summary ACTION list should explicitly include show or clarify it is the default path.

openFindings.title: Command surface expanded beyond original spec verbs
openFindings.description: Parent spec scoped /goal to set/show/clear/complete/pause; shipped command adds history/doctor/health/resume.

openFindings.title: Continuation in-flight lock is a check-then-act race
openFindings.description: Two concurrent session.idle events can both pass the has check before either add, causing double promptAsync dispatch and double auto-turn charges.

openFindings.title: Cross-runtime parity for the deep-review skill is strong (3 SKILL.md + 3 commands byte-identical; 3 agents with 1 per-runtime translation)
description.json lastUpdated is stale (2026-07-01)
description.json level='phase' but spec.md declares 'phase parent'
Duplicate budget-prefixed status aliases
openFindings.description: goalStateLines emits both canonical and budget-prefixed aliases for the same token values.

openFindings.title: executeGoalAction default show action is dead code
openFindings.description: Unknown actions fallback to show, but command router never dispatches unknown actions.

openFindings.title: executeGoalStatus lacks includeInjectionPreview option
openFindings.description: executeGoalAction accepts includeInjectionPreview but executeGoalStatus always renders the preview.

openFindings.title: export-contract uses non-destructured node:test import
Failure envelope normalizes unknown action to show
openFindings.description: failureLines maps unrecognized actions to show, which is misleading if a different action failed.

openFindings.title: goal-events.log grows unbounded under DEBUG
openFindings.description: logDebugEvent appends one line per event when MK_GOAL_DEBUG=1 with no rotation or size cap.

openFindings.title: GOAL_ACTIONS includes later-phase verbs without provenance
openFindings.description: history/doctor/health/resume were added after original spec scope but carry no comment or deprecation path.

openFindings.title: goal_opencode.md output summary omits mutation= field
openFindings.description: mutation= is described in prose but missing from the STATUS/ACTION envelope summary lines.

openFindings.title: goal_plugin.md output field table omits emitted fields
openFindings.description: blocked_by_prompt, continuation_suppressed, continuation_attempts, and continuation_suppressed_reason are emitted but not documented.

openFindings.title: goal_plugin.md verification list is stale
openFindings.description: Verification section lists 7 test files; the suite now has 10 files.

openFindings.title: GoalError codes are string literals without centralized enum
openFindings.description: Error codes appear as inline strings across the file instead of a single const enum.

openFindings.title: goalStateLines emits duplicate tokens_used/budget_tokens_used + usage_source/budget_usage_source
loadPluginModule/withState helpers duplicated across 7 of 8 goal test files
maxAutoTurns clamping to env value is undocumented
openFindings.description: reserveContinuationTurn clamps stored maxAutoTurns to the current env cap, but docs describe the env var only as a default for new goals.

openFindings.title: Only phase 016 ships a checklist.md across all 22 phase folders

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (advisory; consistent with lean Level 1 design)

openFindings.title: OpenCode/Codex deep-review agents are byte-identical; Claude differs in 4 lines
Orphan phase folder 009-diagnostic-review/ has no spec.md/plan.md/tasks.md/impl-summary.md
Parent '6-file test suite' narrative is wrong; actual is 8 files / 101 tests

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (test count narrative drift, grounded in empirical run)

openFindings.title: Parent handoff table annotates phase 010 verification as 'not cited' but impl-summary now has full citations

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (parent handoff table stale annotation)

openFindings.title: Parent last_active_child_id points at Planned phase 018 (resume misroute risk)
Parent phase map does not reflect phase 015 completion
openFindings.description: Parent map lists phase 015 Planned, matching the child spec but conflicting with the child implementation summary.

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (three-way status disagreement, missed by four-reviewer audit)

openFindings.title: Phase 012 has a three-way status disagreement (spec=Draft, graph=draft, impl=Complete)

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (three-way status disagreement, missed by four-reviewer audit)

openFindings.title: Phase 012 impl-summary lacks the T014 revert-and-fail spot-check cited in spec.md:218

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (advisory; missing spot-check in impl-summary)

openFindings.title: Phase 015 REQ-003 redundantly targets 014's now-present Status row
Phase 015 status inconsistent between spec and implementation summary
openFindings.description: Child spec says Planned while implementation-summary says Complete and 100% completion.

openFindings.title: Phase 016 checklist overclaims completion while live code still contains F2 and F3 defects
openFindings.description: CHK-F2 and CHK-F3 are marked complete with RED/GREEN evidence, but mk-goal.js still exhibits the check-then-act race and queue-bypass sweep. Phase spec says Planned while checklist claims 100% complete.

openFindings.title: Phase 018 '16-seam pin' narrative is stale; current __test has 17 seams
Phase map omits 009-diagnostic-review sibling folder
openFindings.description: Directory listing contains 009-diagnostic-review but phase map only lists 009-speckit-command-goal-prompt-offer.

openFindings.title: Planned phase 015-021 implementation-summary.md templates carry 'Status: Complete' boilerplate

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (template voice leak in Planned phase docs)

openFindings.title: PROMPT_OVERHEAD_CHARS magic constant lacks derivation
openFindings.description: Value 1900 determines objective budget in buildEnhancedGoalPrompt but has no derivation comment.

openFindings.title: recoverProviderUsageLimitIfDue does not recover budget_limited goals
openFindings.description: Only usage_limited goals are resumed; budget_limited remains terminal even if the budget constraint changes.

openFindings.title: redactEvidence misses common secret formats
openFindings.description: Regex set omits Google API keys, PEM private key blocks, and hex high-entropy secrets from evidence redaction.

openFindings.title: redactEvidence regex false-positives on legitimate API_KEY mentions

transitions.reason: Initial discovery (advisory; over-redaction is a UX concern not a security leak)

openFindings.title: retryAfterDeadlineFromValue misinterprets large second values
openFindings.description: Numeric values above 1e12 are treated as absolute ms without unit validation, so large Retry-After seconds become distant epoch timestamps.

openFindings.title: role marker sanitizer only handles colon delimiter
openFindings.description: Role label rewrite requires a colon; equals or arrow delimiters around system/developer/etc. are not neutralized.

openFindings.title: session.idle handler calls continuation with missing sessionID
openFindings.description: When sessionID is falsy the branch still invokes maybeContinueGoal(null), logging a misleading missing_session_id reason.

openFindings.title: SKILL.md allowed-tools includes Task but runtime agents deny Task (LEAF-only contract drift)
SKILL.md allowed-tools missing MCP allowlist specifics (mcp__mk_code_index__*, mcp__mk_spec_memory__*)
Smoke mode reports would_fire without promptAsync check
openFindings.description: autonomyMode === smoke returns would_fire before verifying client.session.promptAsync exists.

openFindings.title: speckit-goal-offer-contract test not matched by documented glob
openFindings.description: Verification docs cite mk-goal-*.test.cjs which excludes speckit-goal-offer-contract.test.cjs.

openFindings.title: State directory resolved relative to plugin file
openFindings.description: Spec names .opencode/skills/.goal-state/; plugin resolves ../skills/.goal-state/ from its own file URL.

openFindings.title: Sweep/archive path can resurrect active goals
openFindings.description: sweepOrphanedActiveStates reads outside the mutation queue and can archive a file while a queued mutator writes a new active file afterward.

openFindings.title: sweepOrphanedActiveStates swallows all errors
openFindings.description: Orphan sweep catches and discards every exception, hiding permission, disk, or integrity failures in state management.

openFindings.title: system-spec-kit playbook is 196 lines / 5 sections vs system-skill-advisor's 503 lines / 8 sections (depth disparity)
system-spec-kit playbook omits mk-goal-continuation.test.cjs from fallback path
tests/helpers/ has only one file; helper extraction is partial
Two catalog rows describe mk-goal-state.test.cjs with different scopes (description parity broken)
Verification commands use per-file node invocation
openFindings.description: Docs list individual node <file> commands instead of node --test runner, losing aggregated output.

openFindings.title: Wall clock cap measures from goal creation not resume
openFindings.description: continuationCapReason uses startedAtMs, so paused-and-resumed goals resume with already-depleted wall budget.
